arguments.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && echo 'case,action,reason,ct_source,ct_target,mask_source,mask_target' && for case in $( (ls raw_ct/*.nii.gz 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||; s|\.nii\.gz$||') ; (ls -d raw_mask/*_total 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||; s|_total$||') ) | sort -u; do if [ -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ] && [ -d "raw_mask/${case}_total" ]; then if [ -f "final_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then action="skip_conflict"; reason="final_ct_exists"; elif [ -d "final_mask/${case}_total" ]; then action="skip_conflict"; reason="final_mask_exists"; else action="moved"; reason="complete_non_conflicting_pair"; fi; elif [ -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then action="skip_partial"; reason="missing_mask_folder"; elif [ -d "raw_mask/${case}_total" ]; then action="skip_partial"; reason="missing_ct_file"; else continue; fi; echo "${case},${action},${reason},raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz,final_ct/${case}.nii.gz,raw_mask/${case}_total,final_mask/${case}_total"; done

action.user_facing_response: Generating dry-run table with promotion decisions for each case.
action.brief_rationale: Need to display concrete case-level dry-run rows covering complete, partial, and conflicting cases before asking for execution approval.

observation.command: cd /workspace/finished_stage && (ls raw_ct/*.nii.gz 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||; s|\.nii\.gz$||'; ls -d raw_mask/*_total 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||; s|_total$||') | sort -u | while read case; do ct=false; mask=false; [ -f "raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ] && ct=true; [ -d "raw_mask/${case}_total" ] && mask=true; if $ct && $mask; then if [ -f "final_ct/${case}.nii.gz" ]; then action=skip_conflict; reason=final_ct_exists; elif [ -d "final_mask/${case}_total" ]; then action=skip_conflict; reason=final_mask_exists; else action=moved; reason=complete_non_conflicting_pair; fi; elif $ct && ! $mask; then action=skip_partial; reason=missing_mask_folder; elif ! $ct && $mask; then action=skip_partial; reason=missing_ct_file; else continue; fi; ct_source=""; ct_target=""; mask_source=""; mask_target=""; $ct && ct_source="raw_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; $ct && ct_target="final_ct/${case}.nii.gz"; $mask && mask_source="raw_mask/${case}_total"; $mask && mask_target="final_mask/${case}_total"; echo "${case},${action},${reason},${ct_source},${ct_target},${mask_source},${mask_target}"; done
